title: Rules Pack 0.1
description: Canonical source schema for the rules-pack-0.1 tier-3 extension pack (#1296, design #1283, ADR-001, generalizing the #1294 lessons pilot + #1295 skills pack). The structured JSON at packs/rules/rules-pack-0.1.json is the SOURCE OF TRUTH for the RFC2119-tiered directives parsed from coding/*.md: for every marker-prefixed directive line it records id, tier (normalized from the coding/* RFC2119 legend per #748: !=MUST, ~=SHOULD, the SHOULD-NOT glyph=SHOULD_NOT, the MUST-NOT glyph=MUST_NOT, ?=MAY), domain (the source doc stem -- testing/security/hygiene/coding/toolchain/debugging/...), the directive text, and the path. Exactly one designated proof DOCUMENT (coding/testing.md) also carries its full body on its first rule entry so the doc can be regenerated as a banner-marked, drift-checked projection (scripts/pack_render.py); every other entry is metadata-only (body null) and the other coding docs keep their hand-authored markdown. The `x-sliceRegistry` block is the schema-declared, agent-facing slice API (mirrors lessons + skills): a named-slice registry mapping slice name -> { path (a constrained dotted path into the source -- NOT JSONPath), filters[] (the fixed tier/domain vocabulary), description }. Agents query by slice NAME only. The `x-display` block declares how scripts/packs_slice.py renders an entry as text (heading field, labelled metadata fields, optional body field, and the empty-result noun) so the slice formatter stays pack-agnostic. The `x-tierVocabulary` enumerates the controlled tier set.

pack.description: Versioned pack identifier. The version lives in the name per #1283 Q6 (pack version is part of the pack name).

version.description: Pack major.minor, mirrored from the pack name suffix.

generated_from.description: Provenance: the sources the one-shot migration (scripts/pack_migrate_rules.py) parsed to build this pack (coding/*.md marker-prefixed directives).

rules.description: One entry per parsed directive (marker-prefixed `- ! ...` / `- ~ ...` / `- (SHOULD-NOT) ...` / `- (MUST-NOT) ...` / `- ? ...` lines, plus prose RFC2119 MUST/SHOULD bullets). Order is sorted source-doc path then in-document order.

id.description: Stable, unique, deterministic slug: `{domain}-{NNN}` (in-document order, 1-based, zero-padded).

tier.description: RFC2119 strength normalized from the coding/* legend marker (#748). The `by-tier` slice filters on this field.

domain.description: Source doc stem (e.g. testing, security, hygiene, coding, toolchain, debugging, build-output, holzmann). The `by-domain` slice filters on this field.

text.description: The directive text (everything after the strength marker), stored verbatim.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the source coding doc.

body.description: Full source-document body (banner-stripped, verbatim) for the ONE designated proof doc's first rule entry (coding/testing.md); null for every metadata-only entry. The renderer reconstructs the proof doc = banner + body.

by-tier.description: Rules whose RFC2119 tier matches any of the requested --tier values (e.g. MUST, MUST_NOT; case-insensitive, repeatable or comma-listed).

by-domain.description: Rules from any of the requested --domain source docs (e.g. testing, security; case-insensitive, repeatable or comma-listed).

list.description: Every rule with its tier, domain, text, and source path.
